details.address: 120 N Cedar St Ste. 725, Charlotte, NC 28202
details.description:
Welcome to Sugar & Sip Coffee and Workshop – where craft coffee meets community.

We’re more than just a café — we’re a creative space serving specialty coffee, espresso drinks, and signature brews made with locally roasted beans. Whether you're here for a quiet morning pour-over or a bold iced latte, every cup is crafted with care.

Looking to deepen your coffee knowledge? Join one of our hands-on workshops — from barista basics to latte art and home brewing mastery, we offer immersive experiences for coffee lovers of all levels.

Stop by for coffee, connection, and creativity — or explore our shop online to bring the café experience home.

reviews_data.review_text: Cute little coffee shop right next to the parking deck. I love having another option for coffee so close to parking! They will rotate flavors seasonally and have pastries.
Such a great workspace & the coffee was amazing.

The grand opening is going so well! Congrats!

Really great atmosphere and location!
